summary: RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) implementation fully tested and verified. All 17 backend tests passed. Frontend navigation filtering and Access Denied page working correctly.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test@ssc.com operator user
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC is fully implemented. Admin (ss@ssc.com) is protected from deletion/password reset. Operator (test@ssc.com) has limited permissions (dashboard:write, sales:write, invoices:write, customers:write, suppliers:read). Sidebar hides Stock, Reports, Assets sections for operator. Access Denied page shows when operator tries restricted URLs (/settings, /users, /stock, /reports). Backend require_permission() checks on stock.py, settings.py, reports.py routers returning 403 for unauthorized access.

admin_protection_delete.details: Admin account ss@ssc.com cannot delete themselves (returns 400 'Cannot delete your own account'). The protected admin check would apply if another admin tried to delete this account.

admin_protection_password_reset.details: Returns 403 'This admin account's password is protected and cannot be changed'

sidebar_filtering_admin.details: Admin sees ALL 7 nav groups: OPERATIONS, FINANCE, PEOPLE, STOCK, REPORTS, ASSETS, ADMIN

sidebar_filtering_operator.details: Operator sees only 4 nav groups: OPERATIONS, FINANCE, PEOPLE, ADMIN. STOCK, REPORTS, ASSETS are hidden.

access_denied_settings.details: Operator typing /settings directly sees Access Denied page

access_denied_users.details: Operator typing /users directly sees Access Denied page

access_denied_stock.details: Operator typing /stock directly sees Access Denied page

access_denied_reports.details: Operator typing /reports directly sees Access Denied page

operator_can_access_sales.details: Operator with sales permission CAN access /sales page

backend_users_list_403.details: Operator (non-admin) gets 403 when trying to list users

backend_sales_200.details: Operator with sales permission gets 200 success
